dvids.title: U.S. Strengthens Maritime Security Cooperation with Kenya During NAVAF Commander’s Visit
dvids.desc: U.S. Naval Forces Africa (NAVAF) strengthened its longstanding security partnership with Kenya during Adm. George Wikoff’s visit to Nairobi and Mombasa, March 24–25.
dvids.unit_name: U.S. Naval Forces Europe-Africa/U.S. Sixth Fleet

dvids.title: CENTCOM Commander Provides Update on Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: U.S. Navy Adm. Brad Cooper, commander of CENTCOM, provides an update on Operation Epic Fury, March 31, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: New York Governor, New York City Mayor, honor New York Army Guard Major Sorffly Davius during Brooklyn funeral.
dvids.desc:
BROOKLYN, N.Y. — New York Gov. Kathy Hochul, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, and New York Attorney General Letitia James joined together to honor New York Army National Guard Major Sorffly Davius during his funeral on Monday, March 27, in Brooklyn.
